subcodes.first_line: O cherished friend! All thy letters have been received, and God willing, a reply shall be penned... Though man may attain to the rank of the righteous and become goodly in deed, acquiring a divine countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز نامه های تو جمیعا رسید و انشاء الله جواب مرقوم میشود ... انسان هر چند بدرجه ابرار رسد و نيکو کردار گردد صورت رحمانی يابد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Christ; Christianity
